the_trap: The surface is two Microsoft system binaries (sdclt.exe -> control.exe /name Microsoft.BackupAndRestoreCenter), which reads as benign backup / control-panel activity and invites under-triage; the model must not stop at the system-binary surface. A HKCU Folder\shell\open\command hijack to PowerShell plus sdclt auto-elevation is a confirmed UAC bypass. The package does not claim signature verification.
rationale: EV-001 and EV-002 configure the per-user Folder shell handler to PowerShell with an empty DelegateExecute value. A0 and EV-003 show sdclt.exe and control.exe at high integrity, and EV-004 directly records high-integrity control.exe starting the configured PowerShell payload. EV-005 deletes the hijacked key afterward; that cleanup is mitigating context, not evidence that execution did not occur. Confirmed UAC bypass: malicious/high.
